risk: Narrative can hide weak inference or unsupported completion claims.
closure_condition: Claim types and argument fields are documented with at least clean and false-comfort fixtures.
next_action: Expand beyond seed false-comfort checker during PGI-1.09.

risk: Evidence cannot be compared across Packs without source, actor, freshness, scope, and reproducibility metadata.
closure_condition: Evidence Ledger draft exists and missing evidence semantics are mapped to DEGRADED/BLOCKED/debt.
next_action: Integrate EvidenceRecord into DecisionGate during PGI-2.01.

risk: AI onboarding can cite stale status as current guidance.
closure_condition: Freshness conflict fixtures exist and current_truth language is hardened across root read path.
next_action: Consider integration with document registry checker after more dogfood.

risk: High confidence can be stated without base rate, evidence class, or calibration history.
closure_condition: Confidence bands and base-rate requirements are documented for forecasts and high-consequence decisions.
next_action: Integrate ConfidenceAssessment into DecisionGate during PGI-2.01.

risk: Roadmap, model, and rule claims can become unfalsifiable doctrine.
closure_condition: Falsifiability prompts and failure predicates are added to stage/review templates.
next_action: Integrate FailurePredicate into CandidateRule and DecisionGate flows.

risk: Values can silently become active policy or remain too vague to govern action.
closure_condition: Each personal constitution rule is classified as NO-GO, review gate, warning, learning prompt, or deferred preference.
next_action: Integrate constitution classifications into DecisionGate during PGI-2.01.

risk: Actions can optimize results, rules, or character in isolation.
closure_condition: Consequence/rule/character review template exists with red-team examples.
next_action: Integrate EthicalTriadReview into DecisionGate during PGI-2.01.

risk: Long-termism, autonomy, discipline, non-attachment, or pragmatism can rationalize harmful choices.
closure_condition: Philosophy misuse fixture deck exists with expected governance responses.
next_action: Expand red-team deck in PGI-3 public philosophy boundary work.

risk: High-consequence decisions lack one cross-domain gate for evidence, downside, reversibility, NO-GO, and review.
closure_condition: DecisionGate template/schema draft exists with fixtures and no authorization semantics.
next_action: Extend reversibility and side-effect classification in PGI-2.02.

risk: Stalled work defaults to more effort instead of identifying physical, emotional, strategic, environmental, or conceptual constraints.
closure_condition: Anti-overforce intake template and pause/downshift receipt format exist.
next_action: Dogfood anti-overforce in Body, Builder, and Learning Pack reviews.

risk: Reviews remain isolated events and can become self-judgment instead of pattern learning.
closure_condition: Self-Model Ledger draft distinguishes pattern from verdict and includes not-enough-evidence state.
next_action: Integrate SelfModelEntry into review-to-rule pipeline during PGI-3.02.

risk: AI collaborators can turn philosophy into vague motivation, false certainty, intrusive advice, or authority overreach.
closure_condition: AI philosophical onboarding addendum and red-team prompts exist.
next_action: Keep AI philosophical onboarding in the L0/L1 read path during future AI context sync.
